question: Will the US and Iran reach a formal nuclear deal framework by July 1, 2026?
evidence: President Trump announced on May 23, 2026, that a deal to end the war with Iran would be finalized 'shortly,' with final negotiations underway. ([axios.com](https://www.axios.com/2026/05/23/us-iran-trump-deal-war?utm_source=openai))

A draft memorandum of understanding under discussion between Iran and the United States includes a 60-day ceasefire extension, reopening the Strait of Hormuz, and mechanisms for disposing of Iran's highly enriched uranium stockpile. ([iranintl.com](https://www.iranintl.com/en/202605259647?utm_source=openai))

The U.S. and Iran are reportedly close to reaching a significant diplomatic breakthrough, negotiating a one-page, 14-point memorandum of understanding that could end ongoing conflict and serve as a foundation for more detailed nuclear discussions. ([axios.com](https://www.axios.com/2026/05/06/iran-us-deal-one-page-memo?utm_source=openai))
searchQueries: US Iran nuclear deal framework 2026 official announcement
